reviews.author: Stephanie K.
reviews.text: Sofía herself is amazing — my color was perfect. Took off a star because I had to DM Instagram three times to get a booking, then they didn't have me in the book when I showed up. Front desk situation is rough.

reviews.author: Bianca R.
reviews.text: Sofía understands curly hair like no one else. I've been to 5 salons in SF and this is the first time I left without my curls being fried. Bringing my sister next.

reviews.author: Jasmine T.
reviews.text: Got my bridal trial done last week. Sofía took two hours and tried three different looks until we found the one. Worth every penny.

reviews.author: Priya S.
reviews.text: Hidden gem. Booking is hard because they don't have an online system but once you're in — magic. Sofía remembered my chemistry from a year ago.

reviews.author: Devon K.
reviews.text: DM'd Instagram 4 times over two weeks, never got a reply. Showed up in person — fully booked through June. If you can't take new clients say so.

reviews.author: Maritza H.
reviews.text: Mi salón favorito en la Mission. Sofía es una artista. Mi quinceañera salió perfecta gracias a ella. ¡Vayan!

reviews.author: Ashley R.
reviews.text: Great cut and color. Wish they had online booking — I almost gave up before getting an appointment.

reviews.author: @amber_m_sf
reviews.text: hi! is there any way I can book for next Saturday for color? prom for my niece 🫶

ai_competitor_simulation.name: Curl Lab AI
ai_competitor_simulation.tagline: Same hands. Same neighborhood. Always replies in 4 minutes.
